flake

(flake 1') [...] ... 17 [...]

[...]-⸢bu⸣-un-nu TE x [...]

(flake 2') [...] ... [...]

flake 3'3'

[...] ⸢qin⸣-na-ti E ⸢SAG?⸣ [...]

(flake 3') [...] buttocks ... [...]

flake 4'4'

[...] munusŠAḪtu₂ IL₂ši x [...]

(flake 4') [...] he brings a sow ... [...]

flake 5'5'

⸢ana⸣ UGU-šu₂ ŠIDnu an-na-a ⸢IK⸣ [...]

(flake 5') you recite over him [...] this ... [...]

flake 6'6'

ŠAḪ tu-maš-šar TUG₂-ḪI.A ša₂!(AŠ₂) iš-⸢ḫu⸣-[ṭu ...]

(flake 6') you release the pig [...]. The garment that he stripped off [...]

flake 7'7'

MAŠ.MAŠ u₃ lu₂GIG la₃ TIu₂ U₄ 3-⸢KAM⸣ [...]

(flake 7') the incantation priest and the patient should not take [...]. On the 3rd day he enters [...] and they take a pig. Falling sickness ... [...]. They shall take as a garment [...] that he stripped off. "Falling sickness" [...].

flake 8'8'

KU₄-ma <<ša₂>> ŠAḪ TIu₂ AN.TA.ŠUB.BA x [...]

flake 9'9'

⸢ša₂⸣ iš-ḫu-ṭu ana TUG₂-ḪI.A TIu₂ AN.⸢TA⸣.[ŠUB.BA ...]

flake 10'10'

* NA dLUGAL.AMAŠ.PA.E₃ DAB-su SUḪUŠ gišx [...]

(flake 10') (If) a person, Lugalamašpae seized him: [...] root of ...-wood, [...] root of hound's-tongue, henbane, ardadillu-plant [...].

flake 11'11'

SUḪUŠ u₂EME.UR.GI₇ u₂ŠAKIR u₂AŠ.TAL₂.⸢TAL₂⸣ [...]

flake 12'12'

šum₄-ma AN.TA.ŠUB.BA UGU NA AL.ŠUB SUḪUŠ gišDIḪ₃ ⸢SUḪUŠ⸣ [...]

(flake 12') If falling sickness affects a person: you wrap in a skin root of baltu-plant, root of [...], root of šunû-tree, root of henbane [...].

flake 13'13'

SUḪUŠ gišŠE.NU₂.A SUḪUŠ u₂ŠAKIR ina KUŠ GAG.GAG⸢pi⸣ [...]

flake 14'14'

* KI.MIN<(šum₄-ma)> AN.TA.ŠUB.BA UGU NA AL.ŠUB NUMUN gišŠINIG <NUMUN> gišMA.NU NUMUN giš[...]

(flake 14') Ditto (If falling sickness affects a person): [...] seeds of tamarisk, seeds of ēru-tree, seeds of [...]-tree [...].

flake 15'15'

* KI.MIN<(šum₄-ma)> AN.TA.ŠUB.BA UGU NA AL.ŠUB SUḪUŠ giššu-ši SUḪUŠ gišNAM.TAR ⸢NUMUN⸣ [...]

(flake 15') Ditto (If falling sickness affects a person): [...] root of liquorice, root of mandragora, seeds of [...].

flake 16'16'

[...] x x u₂ar₂-zal-⸢la⸣ [...]

(flake 16') [...] ... arzallu-plant [...]

(end surface missing)
